Home»Sport»Paris Olympics 2024»NO chance for medals for Team South Africa on Tuesday, 6 August

Team SA will be involved in three sporting codes at the Paris Olympics on Tuesday, 6 August although none of them will result in any medals.

Team South Africawill be involved inthreesporting codes at theParis Olympics 2024onTuesday, 6 Augustalthough none of them are involved in determining any medals.

Enjoy the Paris Olympic Games 2024 experience at your favourite ATKV Resort!

Sport climbing,canoeingand a busy day at theathleticslie ahead.

Team South Africa started the day with four medals with Tatjana Smith (gold and silver) and the men’s sevens rugby and Alan Hatherly (bronze) putting them in atie for 29th placeon the overall table.

For the latest Paris Olympics 2024 news, bookmarkThe South African website’sdedicated section for free-to-read content

Women’s 400m heats (11:28):Miranda Coetzee

Men’s 200m heats, repechage (12:54):Benjamin Richardson

Men’s 400m semi-finals (19:42):Lythe Pillay

Men’s 400m semi-finals (19:49):Zakhiti Nene

Women’s 400m hurdles, semi-finals (20:07):Zeney Geldenhuys

Women’s 400m hurdles, semi-finals (20:17):Rogail Joseph

Men’s kayak, double 500m heats (12:00):Hamish Lovemore and Andrew Birkett

Women’s kayak, double 500m heats (12:20):Tiffany Koch and Esti Olivier

Women’s boulder & Lead, semi-final boulder (10:00):Lauren Mukheibir

Men’s speed, qualification seeding (13:00):Joshua Bruyns

title: NO chance for medals for Team South Africa on Tuesday, 6 August
author: Garrin Lambley
description: Team SA will be involved in three sporting codes at the Paris Olympics on Tuesday, 6 August although none of them will result in any medals.
